label: Title - one sentence on why
text: This walkthrough shows how the platform meets the brief. Three role profiles, the data-handling controls, and the no-leak gate the customer set out as a pass or fail.

label: Roadmap - agenda
text: Here is the agenda. The three profiles in the brief. Groups and test users. The per-source pattern, step by step. Function-bounded scope and the carve-outs. And then the gate test, live, as a bounded user.

label: Roadmap - Part 1
text: First, the three profiles. A full-read administrator, a region-bounded user, and a function-bounded user. We wire each one in turn.

label: D+A card - profiles described
text: The administrator is the control case. The region-bounded user sees only their region's data, and any national aggregate scopes to their slice. The function-bounded user sees only the sources their function needs. Out of domain, the agent refuses honestly, rather than pivoting to a different answer.

label: SI - Groups tab, three gov groups
text: In Users and Groups, three new governance groups. Same admin, region, function shape as the brief.
